---
title: "Graph Analyse"
format: html
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import sys
sys.path.append(".")

from defs_graph_plot import load_processed, build_lift_graph, build_plot, detect_communities
import networkx as nx

data, ranking, pairs = load_processed("../data")

G           = build_lift_graph(pairs, data, ranking, top_n=300, min_count=50, min_lift=2.0)
pos         = nx.spring_layout(G, dim=3, k=0.6, iterations=200, seed=42)
communities = detect_communities(G)
fig         = build_plot(G, pos, ranking, communities=communities)
fig.show()
```
